##NAMES=Goedkenite
##RRUFFID=R130667
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Sr_2_Al(PO_4_)_2_(OH)
##LOCALITY=Palermo No. 1 mine, Groton, Grafton County, New Hampshire, USA
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Rock Currier
##DESCRIPTION=Vitreous clusters of tabular colorless-to-white crystals with wedge-shaped form, associated with quartz in a vug.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R130667
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
